_publications._publicationTitle: Modelling neurofibromatosis type 1 tibial dysplasia and its treatment with lovastatin.

_contextSnippet: The process of cortical and medullary defect healing was quantified with μCT at day 14 after injury
details: Successfully quantified mineralised matrix in cortical regions and bone marrow shaft, enabling precise BV/TV measurements at 7 and 14 days post injury
